creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have committed pcre part and passed maintainership to ports@. Travis,
thanks for maintaining the port so far.

However, I didn't mark it non-workable with php5. Before doing it, I
would like to see what errors do you get running it on php5, since
developers claim osCommerce should work with php from 4.0 to latest
version.

Roman Bogorodskiy
